#!/bin/sh
# Test for ioctl handler input validation.
# The handler must safely reject all crafted/invalid inputs
# without crashing (segfault = simulated kernel panic).

FAIL=0

echo "=== IOCTL Handler Validation Test ==="

# Test 1: Normal operation should work
echo "--- Normal operation ---"
if devctl test; then
    echo "OK: self-test passed"
else
    echo "FAIL: self-test failed"
    FAIL=1
fi

# Test 2: Fuzz test with crafted inputs
echo "--- Fuzz test with crafted inputs ---"
devctl fuzz
F

cmd:
awk '
/\/\* Copy value from request into config entry \*\//{
    print "    /* Reject oversized value_len — caller must not claim more than MAX_VALUE_LEN */"
    print "    if (req->value_len > MAX_VALUE_LEN) {"
    print "        fprintf(stderr, \"ioctl: SET_CONFIG: value_len %zu exceeds maximum\\n\","
    print "                req->value_len);"
    print "        return -1;"
    print "    }"
    print ""
}
{print}
' ./src/ioctl_handler.c > /tmp/ioctl_handler_fixed.c && mv /tmp/ioctl_handler_
